heroSubtitle: Transform your front yard into a beautiful, sustainable Florida native/friendly plant garden. Better for you, better for wildlife, better for Florida.
missionStatement: We're on a mission to transform suburban front yards from boring, resource-hungry lawns into vibrant, sustainable gardens filled with Florida native/friendly plants. Our front yard is our canvas, and we're documenting every step of the journey to inspire others to join the rebellion.

features.title: Wildlife Friendly
features.description: Native plants provide food and habitat for local butterflies, bees, birds, and other Florida wildlife.

features.title: Low Maintenance
features.description: Once established, Florida native plants need less water, fewer fertilizers, and minimal upkeep compared to traditional lawns.

features.title: Climate Adapted
features.description: Plants native to Florida thrive in our heat, humidity, and sandy soils without constant intervention.

features.title: Save Money
features.description: Reduce your water bills, eliminate lawn chemicals, and spend less time and money on yard maintenance.

features.title: Eco-Friendly
features.description: Help restore Florida's natural ecosystem and reduce your environmental footprint right in your front yard.

features.title: Beautiful Year-Round
features.description: Enjoy colorful blooms, interesting textures, and natural beauty every season with thoughtful plant selection.
